Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') AND (bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1, 2) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 2)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/99092e2240d1f4c74c27934eba9706c07820f84d2c189404177e844d88ee5af1/bf7de446-cec8-4033-b35a-e60a764f1ba3/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
